hook: A second date should usually answer whether the first-date interest has real follow-through, not just replay the same uncertainty.
body: The second meeting is where tone, effort, and compatibility often become easier to read than they were under first-date nerves.

hook: Many men either chase a second date automatically or rule it out too fast based on one imperfect first impression.
body: Use the second date to gather better data, not just to confirm your first fantasy or fear.

hook: Use the second date to gather better data, not just to confirm your first fantasy or fear.
body: A first date with mild nerves but genuine warmth may become much clearer on date two than a flashy but unstable first encounter.

body: Ask whether the first date showed enough curiosity and ease to justify a clearer second look.
